notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, second baseman Lenyn Sosa to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Yandy Díaz to 3rd. Ryan Vilade out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, second baseman Lenyn Sosa to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Yandy Díaz to 3rd. Ryan Vilade out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yandy Díaz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yandy Díaz grounds into a double play, shortstop Ernie Clement to second baseman Lenyn Sosa to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Taylor Walls out at 2nd. Yandy Díaz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca grounds into a force out, fielded by second baseman Ernie Clement. Cedric Mullins scores. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Jonny DeLuca to 1st. Throwing error by second baseman Ernie Clement.

notableEvents.label: Daulton Varsho pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daulton Varsho singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jonny DeLuca.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Giménez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez lines out sharply to center fielder Jonny DeLuca.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca grounds into a force out, fielded by second baseman Ernie Clement. Cedric Mullins scores. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Jonny DeLuca to 1st. Throwing error by second baseman Ernie Clement.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca grounds into a force out, fielded by second baseman Ernie Clement. Cedric Mullins scores. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Jonny DeLuca to 1st. Throwing error by second baseman Ernie Clement.

notableEvents.label: Daulton Varsho pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daulton Varsho lines out to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
